title: Audit and refactor legacy API endpoints

title: Design token system for new design language
description: Create shared tokens for typography, spacing, color, and shadows across web and docs.

title: Implement OAuth2 with PKCE for web client
description: Replace session auth with OAuth2 PKCE flow and support GitHub and Google providers.

title: Set up end-to-end testing with Playwright
description: Add smoke tests for login, billing and issue workflows and run in CI.

title: Migrate database schema to PostgreSQL 16
description: Execute zero-downtime migration and validate ORM compatibility.

title: Redesign onboarding experience
description: Build a multi-step setup flow with progress indicator and sample workspace.

title: Rate limiting middleware for public APIs
description: Implement token bucket rate limiting with configurable per-route limits.

title: Add keyboard navigation to command palette
description: Support fuzzy search, arrow-key navigation, and accessibility announcements.

title: Integrate Stripe billing webhooks
description: Handle subscription lifecycle events and keep billing state synchronized.

title: Set up observability stack with OpenTelemetry
description: Configure traces, metrics, and logs with Grafana dashboards.

title: Prototype AI-generated issue summaries
description: Assess output quality and define product guardrails before launch.

title: Deprecate legacy cycle archive endpoint
description: Remove deprecated endpoint and update dependent clients.
